title: StaffForge Skill
description: Canonical skill definition for the StaffForge multi-provider AI agent framework

name.description: Unique skill identifier (kebab-case, must match filename without extension)

description.description: One-line summary of what this skill does and when to use it

version.description: Semantic version of the skill definition

keywords.description: Keywords for task-matching — when a user prompt matches these, the skill is loaded

globs.description: File glob patterns that trigger this skill (platform-specific)

compatible_platforms.description: Platforms this skill is compatible with (empty = all platforms)

author.description: Creator or maintainer of this skill
